root_causes: Preview bundle called https://api.theearnalism.com/api directly, causing CORS failures from the Vercel preview origin.
Inline PostHog loader could create redirected third-party script console errors when enabled on preview.
Visual smoke treated expected gated 404 resources and safe unavailable states as critical blockers.
Visual smoke did not wait long enough for reader route content after the loading state.

fixes_applied.change: Production builds now default to same-origin /api unless an explicit backend URL is configured.
PostHog loader now requires REACT_APP_ENABLE_POSTHOG=true in addition to a key.
Approved audiobook spotlight no longer probes a default slug unless an approved spotlight slug is configured.
Smoke waits for app/unavailable-state selectors, reports resource URLs, allows only expected gated A Ghost Story 404s, and still fails closed on JS errors/unexpected resources/browser failures.
